examples: His Bentwood chairs are among the most successful examples of early mass-produced furniture.
His Bentwood chairs are among the most successful examples of early mass-produced furniture. Bentwood is light, comfortable, and inexpensive, as well as strong and graceful.
In fact, Aalto's almost as famed for his Bentwood armchairs and Savoy vases as his architecture.
Scythes are still sold worldwide in their classic 19th-century form, with a curved bentwood snath (handle).
And London-based architect Andy Martin teamed up with furniture company Thonet to design a gorgeous bentwood fixed-gear bike.
